data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update all script-level and config-level consumers that hardcode old skill names (design-onboarding, dev-onboarding, project-setup) to reference the new names (onboarding, architect-foundation)
**Why**: Without these updates, CI-fatal checks will fail: check-skill-refs.sh will reject /dso:onboarding references, evals will fail on missing paths, and check-onboarding.sh will report false failures for completed onboarding
**Scope**:
- IN: check-onboarding.sh (search .claude/design-notes.md, reference new skill names); validate-review-output.sh caller hash registry (add architect-foundation entry); check-skill-refs.sh DSO_SKILLS list (add onboarding and architect-foundation); test-sub-agent-guard.sh (update skill name expectations); evals.json (update skill existence assertions); dso-setup.sh post-install message
- OUT: DESIGN_NOTES.md file reference updates (S6); redirect stubs (S8); CLAUDE.md updates (doc story)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, check-onboarding.sh searches .claude/design-notes.md (in addition to legacy paths) and references new skill names in its JSON output
  ← Satisfies: "invoking any old name redirects with guidance"
- When this story is complete, validate-review-output.sh caller hash registry includes architect-foundation as a valid caller
  ← Satisfies: "/dso:architect-foundation reads .claude/project-understanding.md as starting context"
- When this story is complete, check-skill-refs.sh DSO_SKILLS list includes onboarding and architect-foundation, and check-skill-refs.sh passes with the new skill references
  ← Satisfies: "A single /dso:onboarding skill replaces /dso:project-setup, /dso:dev-onboarding, and /dso:design-onboarding"
- When this story is complete, test-sub-agent-guard.sh tests pass with the new skill directory names and redirect stubs
  ← Satisfies: "A single /dso:onboarding skill replaces /dso:project-setup, /dso:dev-onboarding, and /dso:design-onboarding"
- When this story is complete, evals.json assertions reference the new skill paths and pass
  ← Satisfies: "A single /dso:onboarding skill replaces /dso:project-setup, /dso:dev-onboarding, and /dso:design-onboarding"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Consumer Impact] This story was surfaced by adversarial review — these are CI-fatal consumers that would break silently without explicit updates
- [Testing] Each consumer has existing tests that must be updated, not just the consumer code

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
